title: Chylismia multijuga
taxonomy: Chylismia multijuga is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a succulent perennial herb that produces yellow flowers. Chylismia multijuga is also known as the many-seeded evening primrose due to its ability to produce a large number of seeds. Within the family Onagraceae, Chylismia multijuga is classified in the genus Chylismia.
uses: Chylismia multijuga, also known as the many-seeded evening primrose, has been used in traditional medicine.
